new_classes.label_en: still wine-like beverage from concentrated grape must in containers > 2 L (CN 2206 00 89)
new_classes.label_de: stilles weinähnliches Getränk aus konzentriertem Traubenmost in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2206 00 89)
new_classes.definition_en: A still (non-sparkling) fermented beverage of heading 2206 obtained by fermentation of concentrated grape must (not the natural fermentation product of fresh grape must), presented in containers with a nominal volume greater than 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three principal distinguishing criteria for CN 2206 00 89: (1) it is an 'other fermented beverage' of heading 2206, (2) it is produced by fermentation of concentrated grape must (not natural fermentation of fresh grape must), and (3) it is presented in containers with a volume greater than 2 litres (LargeContainer). The non-sparkling (still) character is asserted via isCarbonated=false. A disjointness complement with the small-container sibling (2206 00 51) is included. Coverage is not 1.0 because the legal note mentions additional detail about the nature of the fermentation arrest process and storage of concentrated must ('Die spätere Gärung wird in der Regel durch…' — the text is truncated), which cannot be fully captured without the complete legal text. The truncated note prevents complete modelling of all fermentation-arrest criteria.
